30.reason: [Loop variable j is not reset to 0 at the start of each loop iteration; should be "for(j=0;j<n;j++)" or declare inside as "for(int j=0;...)" to ensure correct behavior]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop variable j is not reset to 0 at the start of each loop iteration; should be "for(j=0;j<n;j++)" or declare inside as "for(int j=0;...)" to ensure correct behavior]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Initialization of j is redundant and misleading; 'for(j=0; j<n; j++)' is intended but written as 'for(j; j<n; j++)', which may compile but relies on j already being 0. However, this is not the cause of compilation error.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop variable j is not reset to 0 at the start of each loop iteration; should be "for(j=0;j<n;j++)"]
